name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Long Beach, CA US Cash Advance at 1951 Ximeno Ave offers quick payday loans and title loans to residents needing emergency cash.
description_long:
US Cash Advance is located at 1951 Ximeno Ave #200 in Long Beach, CA, offering quick payday and title loans to local residents. The standalone storefront operates Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, with extended weekend hours on Saturday and Sunday from 10AM to 7PM, making it convenient for working Long Beach residents to access emergency funds.

At this Long Beach location, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending options. Staff can explain eligibility requirements and provide personalized guidance. Call +1 562-478-2751 to speak with a loan specialist or learn more about the application process.

Whether you need emergency cash for unexpected expenses or regular financial gaps, the Long Beach US Cash Advance on Ximeno Ave is designed for quick processing. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account to apply. Hours are flexible to fit your schedule, and the team works to get you answers fast.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available; customer reports receiving money within 2 hours
In-person staff assistance with named employees praised for patient, transparent explanations
Accepts all credit types including bad credit; explicitly welcomes no-credit-check applicants
Extended operating hours (8am–9pm weekdays) suitable for working customers
No collateral required; unsecured loan structure
Multiple loan product options ($100–$50,000 range) for different financial needs
Online application option available in addition to in-person applications
cons: Minimal fee, APR, and repayment term transparency on website; no rate disclosure for comparison
Brand/operational confusion evident in reviews (one mentions 'Express Payday Loans' in same context)
No clear state licensing information, regulatory disclosures, or consumer protection statements visible
Physical location limited to single Detroit address despite online service claims; geographic accessibility limited
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area; limited physical facility capacity
best_for: Workers needing immediate cash before next paycheck with poor credit history
Borrowers facing unexpected expenses (medical bills, urgent repairs) requiring same-day funding
Consumers denied by traditional banks/credit unions due to bad credit or no credit history
Individuals seeking fast approval with minimal documentation requirements
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for workers facing immediate cash shortfalls who have exhausted traditional lending options and can access their Detroit location or apply online. The primary caveat is the absence of transparent APR, fee, and repayment term disclosure—essential information for assessing true borrowing cost—and minimal regulatory transparency, requiring applicants to request and review actual loan documents before committing.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 1951 Ximeno Ave #200, Long Beach, CA. Quick payday and title loans with fast approval.
